docs.title: Sandbox Python & Node.js Environment Setup
docs.scope: Guides a developer through installing dependencies and running tests inside this distrobox sandbox, where /tmp is ephemeral and parts of the home directory are read-only.

docs.title: Node Version Pinning for Frontend
docs.scope: Explains how the frontend Node.js version is pinned via .nvmrc and package.json engines, ensuring local dev matches CI and avoiding jsdom incompatibilities with newer Node releases.

docs.title: Git Remote Configuration & Fork Workflow
docs.scope: Documents the git remote topology: origin points to the rFantic/open-geo fork (push target), upstream to Pupok462/open-geo (source of truth). Covers how the fork was created, how to sync with upstream, and the push permission model.
